formulas.name: Law of Dominance
formulas.formula: The dominant allele will be expressed over the recessive allele
formulas.notes: Used to predict the genotype and phenotype of an individual

formulas.name: Punnett Square
formulas.formula: A graphical representation of possible genotypes and phenotypes
formulas.notes: Used to predict the probability of specific genotypes and phenotypes in offspring

formulas.name: Hardy-Weinberg Principle
formulas.formula: The frequency of alleles in a population remains constant from generation to generation under certain conditions
formulas.variables: Allele frequencies, population size, mutation rate, gene flow, selection pressure
formulas.notes: Used to predict the genetic structure of a population

formulas.name: Genotype and Phenotype Relationship
formulas.notes: Used to predict the phenotype based on genotype

formulas.name: Sex Determination Laws
formulas.formula: XY sex chromosomes determine male sex, XX sex chromosomes determine female sex
formulas.notes: Used to understand the sex determination process in humans
